arts.ttl: My Manchester United career was ended in one chat - but it changed my life forever
arts.sum: Sean McAuley now coaches in America, but his time at Man United under Sir Alex Ferguson shaped him.

arts.ttl: What Ruben Amorim Man United team hint means for Newcastle's Champions League hopes
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has hinted at potential changes to the starting line-up for Sunday's Premier League clash with Newcastle at St James' Park - but has vowed to pick a strong capable of winning the game. We have to face Newcastle with a team that we can be competitive to win the game.

arts.ttl: Man United receive Jarrad Branthwaite warning as Matheus Cunha transfer reality emerges
arts.sum: The latest Manchester United transfer news and gossip includes an update on Matheus Cunha and Jarrad Branthwaite

arts.ttl: I'm a plumber but all anyone wants to hear about is how I played for Manchester United and England
arts.sum: After being close to achieving his boyhood dream of playing for Man United's first-team, former academy graduate Lee Lawrence was forced to open a new chapter in his life because of injuries.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Lyon hero turns Andre Onana's words against him as Ruben Amorim hails star
arts.sum: Andre Onana made two costly errors in Manchester United's 2-2 draw with Lyon and Rayan Cherki, who scored their late equaliser, has rubbed salt in the goalkeeper's wounds

arts.ttl: Man United lineup vs. Newcastle: Predicted XI for Premier League clash as Ruben Amorim makes Andre Onana decision
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Manchester United could line up for Sunday's Premier League clash with Newcastle United at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim 'planning clear-the-air talks' with Man United attacker ahead of £40m transfer decision
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim is reportedly primed to hold showdown talks with one of his loaned-out attackers if they return to Old Trafford this summer.

arts.ttl: How Joshua Zirkzee's Manchester United revival can be the blueprint for calamity keeper Andre Onana
arts.sum: If Andre Onana needed a guide on the road to redemption at Manchester United, he need look no further than Joshua Zirkzee.

arts.ttl: Newcastle lineup vs. Man United: Predicted XI for Premier League clash with Eddie Howe set to make Alexander Isak call
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Newcastle United could line up for Sunday's Premier League clash with Manchester United at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Papers: Man Utd considering move for Wolves star Cunha
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Saturday's newspapers...
